theme: App boot restore and cache graph normalization

findings.journey: open local owner QA app and render Business Manager
findings.expected: The shell renders after local owner session resolution.
findings.actual: Before the fix, PhantomStore's missing store export blocked module startup and left only the boot fallback visible.
findings.evidence: Browser Runtime.exceptionThrown from phantomstore.js plus initial npm run test:responsive-viewports failure

findings.journey: separate PhantomForce and ChicagoShots users and organizations
findings.expected: Safe local Postgres fixture can run DB-auth browser proof.
findings.actual: Docker Desktop Linux engine was not running, so the Postgres fixture could not start.
findings.evidence: docker ps failed opening dockerDesktopLinuxEngine pipe

findings.journey: prevent accepted decisions from disappearing in stale worktrees
findings.expected: npm run test:change-memory passes before push, sync, or live claim.

commands.command: node --check app\js\main.js; node --check app\js\store.js; node --check app\js\medialab.js; node --check app\js\workspaces.js; node --check app\js\phantomstore.js

commands.result: fail; missing accepted layer drag/transform controls
pass; no stale app cache ids

fixed: admin app boot fallback caused by missing store export
blockedExternalAccess: Docker/Postgres fixture for DB-auth organization isolation

nextCycle: Reconcile change-memory failures first, especially Media Lab editor controls and customer plan switching; resume DB-auth org isolation when Docker/Postgres is available.
